case_title: ASHOK K SABHLOK VS. WO CONG SITU et al

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SABHLOK, ASHOK K RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SITU, WO CONG $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED FEB-04-2013.
